# Obsidian Orbital technical team

First mentioned: **3302-02-24**

## Biography

During the first quarter of 3302, the Obsidian Orbital technical team pioneered efforts to counter the technological plague using meta-alloys — the exotic materials harvested from Thargoid barnacle sites. Their research showed promising results, with meta-alloy treatments alleviating systems failures at Obsidian Orbital and offering hope that the cascading malfunctions affecting dozens of stations could be reversed.

Progress came to an abrupt halt when Professor Ishmael Palin, the team's lead researcher and the galaxy's foremost authority on extraterrestrial objects, disappeared under mysterious circumstances. Without Palin's guidance, the technical team could not advance their understanding of the meta-alloy mechanisms, and research stalled while multiple starports continued to suffer from unknown artefact interference. The team's experience illustrated both the breakthrough potential and the fragility of cutting-edge xeno-research, which depended on the expertise of individuals whose loss could set back entire fields by months or years.
